title: Update Settings
description: Configure the Instagram Reels Scraper settings including result limits

content.introduction: Configure your Instagram Reels Scraper squid settings. Control the maximum number of reels collected per task and across the entire run.

scraperParams.title: Scraper Parameters
scraperParams.content: Set these parameters in the `params` object:

rows.description: Maximum number of reels to collect per task (profile)
Maximum number of unique results retrieved across all tasks in the entire run
Display name for your squid configuration

limitBehavior.title: Understanding Limits
limitBehavior.content:
**max_results**: Limits reels collected from each profile URL. Useful when scraping multiple creator profiles.

**max_unique_results_per_run**: Global limit across all tasks. The scraper stops once this total is reached, regardless of individual task limits.

proTips.content: Set `max_results` to 50-100 when scraping multiple profiles to get a representative sample from each.
Leave limits empty or null for unlimited collection.
Large profiles can have thousands of reels. Set appropriate limits to control costs and processing time.

seo.title: Update Settings - Instagram Reels Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to configure Instagram Reels Scraper settings including result limits using the lobstr.io API.
